name: ci
description: This repository now uses a hybrid eval strategy:

scripts.lint:openapi:redocly: redocly lint openapi-spec.yaml --config .redocly.yaml && redocly lint openapi-spec.json --config .redocly.yaml
scripts.lint:openapi:spectral: spectral lint openapi-spec.yaml --ruleset .spectral.yaml && spectral lint openapi-spec.json --ruleset .spectral.yaml
scripts.bundle:openapi: redocly bundle openapi-spec.yaml --config .redocly.yaml --output dist/openapi.bundle.yaml && redocly bundle openapi-spec.yaml --config .redocly.yaml --output dist/openapi.bundle.json
scripts.generate:docs: npm run generate:docs:endpoints-catalog && npm run generate:docs:endpoint-reference
scripts.check:docs: npm run verify:docs && npm run smoke:docs
scripts.lint:openapi: npm run lint:openapi:redocly && npm run lint:openapi:spectral
scripts.check:openapi: npm run sync:openapi:public-routes && npm run enforce:openapi:public && npm run normalize:openapi:nullable && npm run quality:openapi:semantic && npm run lint:openapi && npm run bundle:openapi && npm run generate:openapi:json && npm run parity:openapi && npm run parity:openapi:public && npm run sync:gateway:api-allowlist && npm run verify:gateway:api-allowlist && npm run verify:gateway:no-residuals
